ch5_start.text: Knowing David wiped the main security servers, you decide to access the localized backup node in the old Archives. It's the only way to see what actually came out of the cavern. The Archives are in total blackout.

ch5_archives_dark.text: You power up your flashlight. The beam cuts through thick, floating dust. You hear a soft, wet slithering sound from the ceiling grates above.

choices.text: Shine the light up at the ceiling.
Keep moving toward the backup node terminal.

ch5_look_up.text: Your light catches a mass of dark, pulsating flesh squeezing through the ventilation grate. It recoils violently from the light, screeching—a sound that mimics metal tearing. A drop of black viscous fluid lands on your arm.

choices.text: Wipe it off and sprint to the terminal.

ch5_terminal_reach.text: You reach the backup node and boot it up. The screen flickers, bringing up the un-wiped footage from Lower Maintenance right before the breach.

ch5_footage.text: On the grainy screen, you see Miller before you arrived. He's trying to seal the door, but the water is filled with thousands of microscopic, bioluminescent spores. They clump together, forming tendrils that force the door open. It's not a single creature. It's a colony.

ch5_eject.text: As you grab the drive, the terminal sparks and dies. The slithering sound is directly behind you now.

choices.text: Turn quickly and shine the flashlight to blind it, then run.

ch5_escape_clean.text: You blind the mass of tendrils just long enough to slip past it and slam the Archive doors shut. You are safe, for now. (Act 1 Complete)

ch5_escape_infected.text: You sprint for the door, but a tendril whips out from the dark, slashing your shoulder. You manage to escape and seal the door, but you can feel the wound burning with a strange, numb heat. (Act 1 Complete)
